title: P2 TUI Remaining: #18, #20, #12, #22
prompt: Complete remaining P2 TUI/operator-visibility backlog items for the workflow skill.

jobs.name: impl-18-runs-detail-layout
jobs.prompt: Implement #18: Runs detail layout for live output and running agents. In scripts/workflow_tui_render.py and scripts/workflow_tui.py: move live output above the prompt in the runs detail panel, and render running agents as a compact multi-column table instead of a single line so more active agents fit without pushing run metadata away. Update tests/snapshots and tests/test_workflow.py as needed. Run WORKFLOW_TEST_MODE=fast python3 -m unittest tests.test_workflow and fix until PASS. Do not launch ccc or other runners; work directly.

jobs.name: impl-20-finished-ago
jobs.prompt: Implement #20: finished-ago field for completed runs and agents. In scripts/workflow_tui_render.py, agent detail and run detail views should show 'finished Nm ago' once status is terminal, alongside duration. Live runs/agents keep showing elapsed duration. Update tests/snapshots and tests/test_workflow.py. Run WORKFLOW_TEST_MODE=fast python3 -m unittest tests.test_workflow and fix until PASS. Do not launch ccc or other runners; work directly.

jobs.name: impl-12-event-rollover
jobs.prompt: Implement #12: event rollover visibility in the TUI. When a run has lost old events due to the bounded history, show a clear warning in the TUI (e.g., in the events tab or overview) and point users to durable artifacts/logs for complete history. Update scripts/workflow_tui_render.py, scripts/workflow_tui_activity.py if needed, and tests/test_workflow.py. Run WORKFLOW_TEST_MODE=fast python3 -m unittest tests.test_workflow and fix until PASS. Do not launch ccc or other runners; work directly.

jobs.name: impl-22-merge-lanes-test
jobs.prompt: Add a dedicated integration test for merge-lanes auto-resolve (#22). It should create a workflow run with two worktree lanes that both edit the same file, call merge-lanes without WORKFLOW_NO_RESOLVE=1, and verify the resolver agent is dispatched and the merge eventually succeeds. Use mocks/fake ccc if needed; tests should not require real model calls. Update tests/test_workflow.py. Run WORKFLOW_TEST_MODE=fast python3 -m unittest tests.test_workflow and fix until PASS. Do not launch ccc or other runners; work directly.

jobs.name: review-semantic
jobs.prompt: Semantic review of the implementation. Check that #18, #20, #12, and #22 are correctly implemented and that tests cover the new behavior. Run WORKFLOW_TEST_MODE=fast python3 -m unittest tests.test_workflow. Fix any issues or file review findings. Return strict JSON: status, findings, tests_passed.

jobs.name: review-standards
jobs.prompt: Standards review. Check LOC limits, no duplication, meaningful names, test quality, snapshot freshness. Run WORKFLOW_TEST_MODE=fast python3 -m unittest tests.test_workflow. Fix any issues. Return strict JSON: status, findings, tests_passed.
